ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the stock exchange */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the stock exchange */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock (e.g., Software, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the stock information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Total amount traded on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" TEXT /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "change_percent" TEXT /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the stock price information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, risk manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module to which the permission applies (e.g., trades, reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time the trade was made */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price per share */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "note" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time the trade was made */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price per share */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "note" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time the log record was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., login, trade, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
